name: Churchill Capital Corp IV
description: Churchill Capital Corp IV was a blank check company, also known as a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. In July 2021, the company completed its business combination with Lucid Motors, an electric vehicle manufacturer, and the combined company began trading on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LCID.
